bead.title: config/test: write fresh library-path-resolution tests; delete config_library_test.go.disabled
bead.description:
Stage 4 of SD-024 test debt cleanup. Library path resolution is alive via cfg.Library.Path (cli/internal/config/config.go:180 — ResolveLibraryResource), but the disabled file references a removed function name. Write fresh tests against the current API + delete the .disabled file with a one-line rationale.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/config/config_library_test.go (new — fresh tests against ResolveLibraryResource)
- delete cli/internal/config/config_library_test.go.disabled
bead.acceptance: ls cli/internal/config/config_library_test.go.disabled returns no-such-file. cd cli && go test -run 'ResolveLibrary' ./internal/config/... passes.
